provenance.subject: Science
provenance.chapterTitle: The Cell: Basic Unit of Life

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT found in an animal cell?
questions.explanation: Animal cells do not have a cell wall. Cell walls are found in plant cells, bacteria, and fungi, providing structural support.

questions.text: The powerhouse of the cell is the mitochondria.
questions.explanation: Mitochondria are called the powerhouse of the cell because they produce ATP (adenosine triphosphate), the cell's main energy-carrying molecule.

questions.text: What is the function of the nucleus in a cell?
questions.correctAnswer: The nucleus controls cell activities and contains genetic material (DNA).
questions.explanation: The nucleus is the control center of the cell. It contains DNA (genetic material) and regulates cell growth, metabolism, and reproduction.

questions.text: The ________ is the jelly-like substance inside the cell membrane.
questions.explanation: Cytoplasm is the gel-like substance within the cell membrane that contains all organelles and is where most cellular activities occur.
